$comment: Declares the licensing status of ambient.mp3. The license-gate test (tests/audio-license.spec.ts) FAILS while cleared=false, so the unlicensed placeholder cannot ship silently. Before deploy: replace ambient.mp3 with a PD / properly-licensed / silent track, then set cleared=true and fill in source + license.
source: Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 OST — 'Une Vie à t'Aimer' (Sandfall Interactive / Lorien Testard)
